question.text: What version of oCIS is running, what are its file-size upload limits from capabilities, and how many project spaces currently exist?
List all users, then list all groups, and finally list all available roles. How many of each exist?
List the authenticated user's spaces, pick the personal space, and list the files at its root. Then get detailed info on the first file found.
Get the current user's profile, list all shares they have created, and list all shares they have received. Summarize the sharing activity.
Perform a health check on the oCIS instance, list the current user's notifications, and list their app tokens. Report the status of each.
Search for files containing "report" across all spaces. For each result, get the file info and identify which space it belongs to by looking up the space details.
List all project spaces, pick one, list its permissions, and list the files at its root. Who has access and what is stored there?
List all users, then list all groups, and for each group retrieve its details including members. Which users belong to which groups?
Get the MCP server configuration, the oCIS server capabilities, and the list of role assignments. Summarize the current system setup.

Get an overview of each of the user's spaces using the workflow tool, then search for any files tagged with a specific tag, and get version info for the oCIS server. Provide a comprehensive status report.
